# qdrant-cloud_accounts_roles (Data Source)

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_version = ">= 1.7.0"
  required_providers {
    qdrant-cloud = {
      source  = "qdrant/qdrant-cloud"
      version = ">=1.13.0"
    }
  }
}

provider "qdrant-cloud" {
  api_key    = "" # API Key generated in Qdrant Cloud (required)
  account_id = "" # Default account ID (can be overridden per data source)
}

# List all roles (system + custom) in the account
data "qdrant-cloud_accounts_roles" "all" {}

# Output all role names and their types
output "roles" {
  value = {
    for role in data.qdrant-cloud_accounts_roles.all.roles :
    role.name => role.role_type
  }
}

# Look up the admin system role ID
output "admin_role_id" {
  value = [
    for role in data.qdrant-cloud_accounts_roles.all.roles :
    role.id if role.name == "Admin"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `account_id` (String) The account ID (UUID). Defaults to the provider-level account_id.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `roles` (List of Object) List of account roles (system and custom). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--roles))

<a id="nestedatt--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `permissions` (List of String)
- `role_type` (String)




## Notes

This data source lists all roles in a Qdrant Cloud account, including both system roles and custom roles.

### System Roles

Every account has three built-in system roles that cannot be modified:

- **Owner** — All permissions including account management. Limited to one user per account.
- **Admin** — All permissions except account deletion.
- **Base** — Minimum privileges. Automatically assigned to all users.

### Custom Roles

Custom roles are created via the `qdrant-cloud_accounts_role` resource and can have any combination of permissions.

This data source is useful for looking up system role IDs to use with the `qdrant-cloud_accounts_user_roles` resource.
